title: catabrosa parviflora
intro: Catabrosa parviflora, also known as small-fruited catabrosa, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of catabrosa parviflora include its ability to reduce congestion, soothe a sore throat, and ease coughs, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Catabrosa parviflora can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
